evidence: All 7 services report healthy status
actual: All healthy

evidence: isLeader=true, instanceId=coordinator-local-local-1772469609029, lock TTL=22s
actual: Leader elected, TTL=22s

evidence: state=CLOSED, consecutiveFailures=0
actual: CLOSED, no failures

evidence: DLQ length=0, forwarding-dlq length=0
actual: DLQ=0, forwarding-dlq=0

evidence: lag=5000, stream length=5000, pending=0. Consumer read 2230 entries but stream has 5000 — lag indicates consumer is behind
actual: lag=5000 — execution engine consumer falling significantly behind opportunity forwarding rate
recommendation: Check execution engine consumer throughput. Stream is accumulating faster than consumer can process.

evidence: pending=50, lag=937. Cross-chain detector group has 937 unread messages in price-updates stream
actual: lag=937, pending=50 — cross-chain detector significantly behind coordinator-group (lag=0) on same stream
recommendation: Cross-chain detector price consumption is slower than coordinator. Check detection processing throughput.

evidence: pending=134, stream length=13073, lag=13
actual: pending=134 (above threshold of 50 but lag is only 13, so actively processing)
recommendation: Monitor pending count — coordinator is processing but accumulating some backlog. May normalize.

evidence: Metrics scrape t0=44 lines, t1=44 lines. pipeline_events_total: 65→105 (incrementing)
actual: pipeline_events_total incrementing. Stream health metrics present.

evidence: P1: 4/4 chains connected (bsc, polygon, avalanche, fantom). P2: 5/5 chains connected (arbitrum, optimism, base, scroll, blast). P3: 3/3 chains connected (ethereum, zksync, linea). P4: 1/1 chain connected (solana). All chains status=connected with events processed.
actual: All 13 chains active across 4 partitions

evidence: riskState=NORMAL, tradingAllowed=true, positionSizeMultiplier=1, currentDrawdown=0, dailyPnLFraction=0
actual: NORMAL — no drawdown triggers

evidence: P1: p50=3ms p95=3ms p99=3ms. P2: p50=3ms p95=3ms p99=3ms. P3: p50=3ms p95=3ms p99=3ms. P4: p50=0ms p95=0ms p99=0ms.
actual: All partitions well under target. P4 shows 0ms (Solana uses different detection path).

evidence: No gas price metrics exposed in Prometheus (arbitrage_gas_price_gwei not present). Simulation mode with simulationsPerformed=0, simulationsSkipped=30.
actual: Gas metrics not exposed. In simulation mode, gas is not actively fetched from RPC.
recommendation: Consider exposing simulated gas prices for monitoring completeness.

evidence: healthyProviders=0, simulationsPerformed=0, simulationsSkipped=30. Simulation mode=true.
expected: In simulation mode, simulations are expected to be skipped
actual: All 30 executions skipped simulation (simulation mode behavior)
recommendation: None — expected behavior in simulation mode

evidence: probabilityTracker: totalOutcomes=0, overallWinRate=0. Separate stats show 70% success rate (21/30). Tracker not recording simulation-mode outcomes.
actual: Probability tracker empty but execution stats show 70% success
recommendation: Verify probability tracker receives simulation outcomes

evidence: bridgeRecovery isRunning=false, metrics=null
actual: Bridge recovery not running — no cross-chain executions in simulation
All services well under memory thresholds. Redis at 28.5%.

evidence: All services return required fields: status (string enum), uptime (number). Partitions include chains, eventsProcessed. EE includes queueSize, activeExecutions, successRate, riskState.
expected: All required fields present with correct types
actual: All health schemas valid across 7 services

evidence: Missing metric: arbitrage_gas_price_gwei. Present: arbitrage_execution_attempts_total, arbitrage_execution_success_total, arbitrage_opportunities_detected_total, arbitrage_queue_depth, arbitrage_active_executions.
actual: Gas price metric missing — observability gap for gas monitoring
recommendation: Expose gas price gauge metric per chain

evidence: Cross-chain detector /metrics returns empty. Expected: cross_chain_opportunities_total.
actual: No metrics exposed — complete observability blind spot
recommendation: Ensure cross-chain detector registers Prometheus metrics even before first detection

evidence: Missing expected metrics: price_updates_total, opportunities_detected_total, events_processed_total. Present: pipeline_events_total, stream_length, stream_pending, pipeline_latency_*
actual: Uses stream-level metrics instead of per-service counters. pipeline_events_total is the only counter.
recommendation: Consider adding standard per-service counters for Prometheus alerting compatibility
